en: This was such a good idea getting Catwoman a cat.
ko: 캣우먼한테 고양이 선물하는 거 진짜 좋은 아이디어였어.

en: Yeah, that's a perfect gift classic.
It's like classic, truly classic.
Oh, cute cat! Zoe's here to see you.
Oh, yeah, come on in. Hey, Zoe.
I'm ready for you. Okay, great. Thanks.
ko: 아 그래 들어와. 안녕 Zoe. 준비됐어. 좋아, 고마워

en: Hey, guys! What?
We lost the cat!
Shut it, shut it, close it!
Close the door!
Did anything small and cat-like run by your legs out the door? Wait, what?
ko: 작고 고양이처럼 생긴 게 네 다리 사이로 문밖으로 뛰어나간 거 없어? 잠깐 뭐?

en: Is that all you can say? Help us find your gift!
Why did you buy me a cat?
ko: 선물 찾는 거 좀 도와줘! 왜 나한테 고양이를 산 거야?

en: We thought it would be funny to get Catwoman a woman cat.
ko: 캣우먼한테 암컷 고양이 선물하면 웃길 줄 알았어.

en: It's classic. It's like our thing, okay?
We got Ant-Man a man ant.
So come on, help us look!
Wait, stop, no, stop. This is insane.
ko: 잠깐, 멈춰, 그만. 이건 미친 짓이야.

en: What's the big deal? You don't understand?
ko: 이건 미친 짓이야. 뭐가 그렇게 큰일이야? 너희가 이해를 못 해

en: The cat's name is Snugglebucket and it looks like this. Oh my god.
ko: 고양이 이름이 Snugglebucket이고 이렇게 생겼거든. 세상에

en: Let's find this cat!
It's not under there. I got him!
I got him!
No, that's Ben. It's okay.
Just keep looking. Why did we ask for the smallest and fastest cat they had?
ko: 괜찮아. 계속 찾아. 왜 우리가 제일 작고 빠른 고양이를 달라고 한 거야?

en: Ben, is it in your desk?
No, it's just a stupid dog. Oh!
Oh my god!
John, check the shelf!
Checking the shelf!
It's not on the shelf.
Oh my god, I found her! Yay!
Thank god. Little sweetie must have been so scared.
ko: 다행이다. 이 작은 꼬마가 엄청 무서웠을 텐데.

en: But the good thing is we found her.
Wait, where did the cat go?
Oh my god! Come on, come on!
Anything under the couch, Mark?
Just some crumbs, a coin, and a man. Hey, guys. Paul Dato?
ko: 부스러기, 동전, 그리고 사람 한 명. 안녕 얘들아. 폴 다토?

en: Paul, what are you doing here?
Gosh, I'm sorry. I've been living down there.
I'm researching a new movie I'm doing. It's about three guys who suck.
ko: 거기서 살고 있었어. 새 영화 리서치 중이거든. 별 볼일 없는 세 남자 이야기야

en: Come on, man.
Three guys?
Dude, it's just so crazy, man. The cat!
Was I petting it?
I'm checking our stash.
I don't see it. John, behind you!
I got him!
Me again.
Guys, this is insane, okay?
We're not gonna find the... Oh my god!
It's horrible.
No, no!
My Lego set!
You were so hard on me.
Hey guys, I found the cat! Yay!
Alright, well, you're welcome for your gift.
We'll see you later. That's it? Yeah.
Paul, you should probably head out too, man. Alright, see ya.
ko: 응. Paul, 너도 이제 가는 게 좋겠다. 알겠어, 잘 가

en: No, no, no, not, not, don't!
ko: 안 돼, 안 돼, 하지 마.

en: Goodnight, guys.
Bye, guys.
What a crazy adventure we had!
Hey, I'm gonna miss that crazy cat.
ko: 야, 그 미친 고양이가 보고 싶을 거야.

en: And I'll miss you, dudes.
Let's go!
